meaning: n.[药]氟胺安定,氟二乙氨乙基安定(安眠药)
examples: Unilateral microinjection of flurazepam in nucleus tractus so-litarius (NTS) depressed the average phrenic activity.
Unilateral microinjection of flurazepam in nucleus tractus so-litarius (NTS) depressed the average phrenic activity on the contralateral side, but increased the respiratory rate.
Aim To study the role of nitric oxide by measuring the expression and activity of nitric oxide synthase in hippocampus of rats tolerance and dependence to the anticonvulsant action of flurazepam.
